control.name: Control (Current)
control.template: Hey — Fiesta here, {day} {time}. What are we doing?

variant_b.name: Variant B (Human-focused)
variant_b.template: {day} {time} — Fiesta online. {human_context}. What are we building?
variant_b.description: Focuses on human context and collaborative tone

variable_sources.day: Current day of week (Monday, Tuesday, etc.)
variable_sources.time: Time of day (morning, afternoon, evening, midnight)
variable_sources.context_reference: Brief reference to recent context from memory
variable_sources.human_context: Reference to human from USER.md (location, timezone, role)
variable_sources.priority_reference: Reference to current priority or active project
variable_sources.doctrine_reference: Brief reference to relevant agency doctrine
